message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column interpolate/drop_duplicates/compare/map parity (frankenpandas-8y97)

Four pandas-parity Column methods:

- interpolate_linear() — fills interior NaN runs via linear
  interpolation between anchor values (matches
  pd.Series.interpolate(method='linear')). Leading/trailing nulls
  are preserved (limit_direction='forward' default). Non-numeric
  columns return TypeError. Result dtype is Float64.
- drop_duplicates() — built atop duplicated(); keeps the first
  occurrence per bucket, treating all missing entries as one bucket.
- compare(other) — pd.Series.compare equivalent. Returns
  (self_diff_column, other_diff_column) containing only positions
  where the two columns differ. Matching nulls are equal; length
  mismatches return LengthMismatch.
- map(func) — apply a unary Fn(&Scalar) -> Scalar; output dtype is
  inferred from results (falls back to self.dtype on all-null /
  empty).

Co-lands frankenpandas-funo (drop_duplicates), c3cy (compare),
1svn (map).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
